subcodes.first_line: O 'Azíyyih! Mayest thou gaze upon the Most Exalted Horizon, tread steadfastly the Path of Truth, and offer praise unto God, exalted be His glory [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عزیه انشاء الله بافق اعلی ناظر باشی و بر صراط حق مستقیم سالک و بثنای حق جل
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @consolation and comfort, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
